title: wolfhsm: NvmMetadata.label is raw [u8; 24] with no helpers
description: NvmMetadata.label is a [u8; 24] with no method to interpret it as a string or trim null padding. Users must manually find the first null byte and convert. Add label_str() -> Option<&str> (or &str with null-trimming) and consider a label_display() for Debug output. Minor but consistent with what a Rust user would expect from a named field.
